pricing.heading: Invest in Your Future
pricing.subheading: One membership. Complete access. Unlimited potential.
pricing.fullAccessDesc: Everything you need to become a professional trader

faq.heading: Questions?
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about Snipers Trading Academy. Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.
faq.q1: What trading experience do I need?
faq.a1: No prior trading experience is required. Our curriculum starts with the fundamentals and progressively builds to advanced strategies. Whether you're a complete beginner or have some experience, our structured learning path will meet you where you are.
faq.q2: How are the live sessions structured?
faq.a2: We hold 3 live trading sessions per week where our instructors analyze markets in real-time, walk through trade setups, and answer your questions. Sessions are recorded so you can review them anytime. Each session typically runs 60-90 minutes.
faq.a3: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on the activation fee. If you're not satisfied with the program within the first 14 days, contact our support team for a full refund. Monthly subscriptions can be cancelled at any time.
faq.a4: Yes! Every member gets access to 1-on-1 mentorship sessions with our experienced traders. You can book sessions to review your trades, discuss strategies, and get personalized feedback on your trading plan.
faq.a5: Our primary focus is on US equity options, but we also cover futures, forex, and cryptocurrency markets. The strategies and risk management principles we teach are applicable across all markets.
faq.q6: How long until I see results?
faq.a6: Results vary based on dedication and practice. Most students start seeing improvement in their trading decisions within 4-6 weeks. We recommend committing at least 3 months to fully internalize the strategies and develop consistent habits.

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Future?
cta.subheading: Join thousands of traders who've mastered the markets with Snipers Trading Academy.

footer.riskWarning: Trading involves risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results.

financials.title: Financial Overview
financials.description: Complete financial view of Trading Hub network revenue and payouts
financials.treasuryWalletConfigDesc: Configure the treasury wallet for receiving payments. Users will send USDC to unique deposit addresses derived from this wallet.
financials.payoutWalletConfigDesc: Configure the hot wallet used to send commission payouts to users. This wallet should hold USDC and MATIC for gas.
financials.treasuryWalletAddressDesc: This is the main wallet address where funds will be collected. All derived deposit addresses funnel here.
financials.masterXpubDesc: Used to derive unique deposit addresses for each payment. Get this from your HD wallet.
financials.xprvSetUpdate: Private key is set. Enter a new value to update it.
financials.xprvRequired: Required for sweeping funds from deposit addresses to treasury. This is the private version of your xpub.
financials.sweepDisabledDesc: Without the xprv, funds cannot be swept from deposit addresses to treasury.
financials.payoutWalletNotConfigured: Payout wallet not configured - payouts disabled
financials.payoutWalletAddressDesc: The wallet address that will send USDC payouts to users.
financials.privateKeySetUpdate: Private key is set. Enter a new value to update it.
financials.privateKeyRequired: Required for signing payout transactions. Get this from MetaMask.
financials.securityNoticeDesc: The private key is stored encrypted in the database. Only keep sufficient funds for payouts in this hot wallet.
financials.treasurySweepDesc: Consolidate USDC from user deposit addresses to the treasury wallet
financials.sweepNotConfigured: Sweep not configured - set master_wallet_xprv in treasury settings
financials.automatedPipelineDesc: Sweeps run automatically every 5 minutes in 4 stages:
financials.automatedPipelineSteps: 1. Identify (find addresses with USDC) → 2. Fund (send POL for gas) → 3. Execute (sweep USDC) → 4. Verify (confirm transactions)
financials.automatedPipelineNote: Deposits with less than $1 USDC are skipped. Each stage processes up to 20-50 addresses per run for scalability.
financials.monthlyVolumeProcessingDesc: Archive sniper volumes, create commissions, and reset counters for the new month
financials.ineligibleUsersDesc: {count} users have volume but are ineligible (inactive):
financials.overpaymentsDesc: These payments received more than expected and need admin decision
financials.usersWithoutPayoutWalletsDesc: These users cannot receive commission payouts until they configure a wallet address
